quadratic_twist_test.why_mod3_agrees: If χ_d(p) ≡ 1 (mod 3) for all good p, then a_p*χ_d(p) ≡ a_p (mod 3). Since χ_d takes values ±1 and -1 ≡ 2 (mod 3), this requires χ_d(p)=+1 or a_p ≡ 0 (mod 3) whenever χ_d(p)=-1.
